openmeter/billing/charges/usagebased/ser.purpose: Stateless usage-rating orchestrator: snapshots metered quantity from ClickHouse (via streaming.Connector) and dispatches to the delta or period-preserving sub-engine to produce DetailedLines or totals. No DB writes — all persistence is owned by callers in the run package.

patterns.name: Config-struct constructor with Validate()
patterns.description: New(Config) validates all required fields before constructing the service. Every exported input type also implements Validate() and is called at the top of the method body.
patterns.example: func New(config Config) (Service, error) { if err := config.Validate(); err != nil { return nil, err } ... }

patterns.name: StoredAtLT cutoff in every ClickHouse query
patterns.description: snapshotQuantity always sets FilterStoredAt.Lt = &in.StoredAtLT in the QueryMeter call so usage is bounded to a deterministic point in time, enabling idempotent re-rating.

patterns.name: Rating-engine dispatch via charge.State.RatingEngine
patterns.description: GetDetailedRatingForUsage switches on charge.State.RatingEngine (RatingEngineDelta or RatingEnginePeriodPreserving) to call deltaRater.Rate or periodPreservingRater.Rate. A default case returns an error — no silent fallback.
patterns.example: switch charge.State.RatingEngine { case usagebased.RatingEngineDelta: ... case usagebased.RatingEnginePeriodPreserving: ... default: return ..., fmt.Errorf("unsupported rating engine: %s", ...) }

patterns.name: Voided-realization exclusion before subtraction
patterns.description: eligibleRealizations filters out runs where run.IsVoidedBillingHistory() before passing AlreadyBilledDetailedLines to the delta engine. Voided runs must also be skipped in ensureDetailedLinesLoadedForRating.
patterns.example: lo.Filter(charge.Realizations, func(run usagebased.RealizationRun, _ int) bool { if run.IsVoidedBillingHistory() { return false } return run.ServicePeriodTo.Before(in.ServicePeriodTo) })

patterns.name: Lazy detailed-line loading via DetailedLinesFetcher
patterns.description: ensureDetailedLinesLoadedForRating checks whether all prior eligible runs have DetailedLines.IsPresent() before calling detailedLinesFetcher.FetchDetailedLines — avoiding unnecessary fetches when lines are already loaded.
patterns.example: if !lo.EveryBy(charge.Realizations, func(run ...) bool { ... return run.DetailedLines.IsPresent() }) { expandedCharge, err := s.detailedLinesFetcher.FetchDetailedLines(ctx, charge) }

patterns.name: WithCreditsMutatorDisabled() always set on rating calls
patterns.description: Both GetTotalsForUsage and GetDetailedRatingForUsage pass billingrating.WithCreditsMutatorDisabled() to ratingService.GenerateDetailedLines so that credit allocation is not applied during rating (callers apply credits separately).

patterns.name: Prefer GetTotalsForUsage over GetDetailedRatingForUsage when only totals are needed
patterns.description: GetTotalsForUsage skips detailed-line construction and only calls ratingResult.Totals — materially faster for pre-advance checks.
patterns.example: totals, err := svc.GetTotalsForUsage(ctx, GetTotalsForUsageInput{Charge: charge, StoredAtLT: storedAt, ...})

key_file_guides.role: Defines the Service interface (GetTotalsForUsage, GetDetailedRatingForUsage, GetPreferredRatingEngineFor), Config struct with Validate(), and New constructor that builds deltaRater and periodPreservingRater.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Pure computation — no Ent/DB dependency. DetailedLinesFetcher is an interface injected via Config; never inject an adapter directly.

key_file_guides.role: Implements GetDetailedRatingForUsage: calls ensureDetailedLinesLoadedForRating, snapshotQuantity, currentBillingPeriod, then dispatches to deltaRater or ratePeriodPreservingDetails.
key_file_guides.watch_for: The current run (ServicePeriodTo == run.ServicePeriodTo) is excluded from eligibleRealizations — never include it as a prior run or subtraction will zero out the current bill.

key_file_guides.role: Implements GetTotalsForUsage: snapshots quantity, calls ratingService.GenerateDetailedLines with DisableCreditsMutator+optional IgnoreMinimumCommitment, and returns only ratingResult.Totals.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Does NOT suffix ChildUniqueReferenceIDs — do not add that logic here; it belongs in the delta/period-preserving engines.

key_file_guides.role: Private snapshotQuantity helper: builds QueryMeter params with FilterStoredAt and MeterGroupByFilters, calls streaming.Connector, sums rows via summarizeMeterQueryRow.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Validation errors wrapped as billing.ValidationError{Err: err} — use the same wrapper for any new validations added here.

anti_patterns: Adding Ent/DB adapter calls inside this package — persistence is exclusively the caller's responsibility.
Calling snapshotQuantity without a non-zero StoredAtLT — every ClickHouse query must be bounded by the stored-at cutoff for idempotent re-rating.
Including the current run (ServicePeriodTo == in.ServicePeriodTo) in eligibleRealizations — it will be subtracted from itself and produce a zero bill.
Passing voided realizations to deltaRater.Rate as AlreadyBilledDetailedLines — IsVoidedBillingHistory() runs must be filtered out before subtraction.
Omitting WithCreditsMutatorDisabled() when calling ratingService.GenerateDetailedLines — credit allocation must be deferred to run creation, not applied during raw rating.

decisions.decision: Stateless package with no DB dependency
decisions.rationale: Rating is a pure computation (snapshot usage + apply rate card). Keeping it DB-free makes it trivially testable with MockStreamingConnector and reusable from multiple callers without transaction concerns.

decisions.decision: Rating-engine selection at dispatch time via charge.State.RatingEngine
decisions.rationale: Delta and period-preserving engines have different correctness trade-offs (delta is production-safe; period-preserving is experimental). Dispatching at service level lets the charge carry its own engine preference without the caller knowing internal engine details.

decisions.decision: Lazy DetailedLines loading via interface rather than pre-loading in callers
decisions.rationale: Prior runs usually have DetailedLines already expanded by the time rating is called; the fetcher interface avoids redundant DB round-trips while providing a safe fallback for cases where they are missing.

code_examples.scenario: Rate a usage-based charge and retrieve detailed lines with the stored-at cutoff
